title: Vacation Tracking and integration with Workload
excerpt: Does Monday offer any kind of integration where A: There is a template for Vacation tracking for staff (this link exits but appears to be broken) Vacation Tracker Template | monday.com . And B: a way to indicate when sta…

posts.author: RyMonday (Ryan Thompson)
posts.cookedHtml: Does Monday offer any kind of integration where A: There is a template for Vacation tracking for staff (this link exits but appears to be broken) Vacation Tracker Template | monday.com . And B: a way to indicate when staff are not available to be scheduled due to vacation that is reflected in the workload widget i.e it would show their row as shaded or labeled as unavailable. Running a system for a TV show with daily assignments and finding it difficult to use for scheduling staff assignments.

posts.author: Teresa.DevSamurai (Teresa Tran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ryan Thompson:

B: a way to indicate when staff are not available to be scheduled due to vacation that is reflected in the workload widget i.e it would show their row as shaded or labeled as unavailable. Running a system for a TV show with daily assignments and finding it difficult to use for scheduling staff assignments.

Hi Ryan,

Monday.com has some basic templates for vacation tracking, but I understand the link you found might not be working. For better tracking and scheduling, I recommend using the Teamboard app.

With Teamboard, you can set up holiday and capacity tracking, showing when staff are unavailable right on the Workload view. If someone is on vacation, it will mark them as unavailable, so you’ll see it easily.

Plus, if you try to schedule tasks when someone is on holiday, Teamboard will notify you, helping avoid scheduling issues. It’s perfect for managing daily assignments, especially in busy environments like yours.

Let me know if you’d like help getting started!

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @RyMonday

For effective scheduling and monitoring of vacations, I recommend using the intuitive vacation tracker template on monday.com. With this template, you can set up holiday and capacity tracking, displaying when staff are available/unavailable right on the capacity view. When someone is on vacation, it will show them as absent, so you’ll identify it easily.

Additionally, if you try to assign tasks when someone is on vacation, the template will notify the status instantly; thus, avoiding scheduling concerns. It’s perfect for handling day-to-day assignments, particularly in busy workspace environments.

Our skilled monday.com consultants can effectively configure and set up vacation tracker template to meet your business requirements.

If you’d like help getting started, submit your requirements here!

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.cookedHtml:
